title: Stop Watching Tutorials - Build These 4 Claude Projects to 10x Output
summary: Austin Marchese recommends building four specific Claude projects rather than watching generic tutorials to improve AI productivity. The projects include an AI Board of Advisors, a niche command center, an AI-optimized website, and an internal operating system, framed as practical learning through building.
